name: io.github.wyre-technology/sherweb-mcp
title: Sherweb
description: MCP server for Sherweb Partner API — distributor billing, service providers, and subscriptions.

environmentVariables.name: SHERWEB_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Sherweb Partner API OAuth client ID

environmentVariables.name: SHERWEB_CLIENT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Sherweb Partner API OAuth client secret

environmentVariables.name: SHERWEB_PARTNER_CODE
environmentVariables.description: Sherweb partner/distributor code identifying your tenant

environmentVariables.name: SHERWEB_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Sherweb Partner API base URL — override only for sandbox/regional endpoints

environmentVariables.name: MCP_TRANSPORT
environmentVariables.description: Transport mode for the server. Set to 'stdio' for local CLI use; the image defaults to 'http' for gateway hosting.

environmentVariables.name: AUTH_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Credential source: 'env' reads vars locally, 'gateway' expects header injection from the WYRE MCP Gateway.

environmentVariables.name: LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Log verbosity: debug, info, warn, error
